headline: Is Caterpillar's Power & Energy Segment Its Next Big Growth Engine?
summary: CAT's Power & Energy segment is riding AI-driven data center demand, with backlog growth and capacity expansion fueling its 2030 targets.

headline: Evercore Turns More Bullish on Caterpillar (CAT) with $1,103 Price Target
summary: Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) is included among the 10 High Quality Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. On May 11, Evercore ISI analyst David Raso raised the price recommendation on Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) to $1,103 from $878. The analyst reiterated an Outperform rating on the stock. headline: Dow Jones Hits Record Highs, DELL Jumps 15%: Stock Market Today
summary: Dell, Qualcomm and HP power an AI-fueled rally to send the Dow to record highs. Nasdaq 100 and S&P 500 eyes eighth straight week of gains.
